entity.name: Office of Science and Technology Policy
entity.description: EOP office that authored the AI Bill of Rights blueprint and coordinates implementation of the AI Executive Order. Lower bindingness than agency rules but sets the cross-agency tone; staffing turnover between administrations is a leading indicator of policy direction.

activity.title: President Donald J. Trump Unveils National AI Legislative Framework
activity.raw_text: Preventing Censorship and Protecting Free Speech: The Federal government must defend free speech and First Amendment protections, while preventing AI systems from being used to silence or censor lawful political expression or dissent. AI cannot become a vehicle for government to dictate right and wrong-think. The Administration is proposing guardrails to ensure that AI can pursue truth and accuracy without limitation.

_verify_phrases: AI cannot become a vehicle for government to dictate right and wrong-think

source_entity.name: Office of Science and Technology Policy
